news.t: How Active ETF TACN Captures Global Stock Growth
Beat Volatility: The Power of Active ETFs
T. ROWE PRICE LAUNCHES ACTIVE CORE ETFs BLENDING BENEFITS OF ACTIVE AND PASSIVE INVESTING; FEES WAIVED THROUGH JANUARY 2027

holdings.infoBox: TACN is an equity ETF with a total of 495 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.77%, AstraZeneca at 1.60%, Shell at 1.36%, HSBC Holdings at 1.35%, and Roche Holding AG at 1.34%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price Active Core International Equity ETF (TACN) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 20.77m in AUM and 489 holdings. TACN is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth by investing in large- and mid-cap companies listed in developed markets excluding the US and Canada TACN was launched on Dec 10, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: How Active ETF TACN Captures Global Stock Growth
data.text: T. Rowe Price is making the case for international equities. The Magnificent Seven now account for 32% of the S&P 500's market value, more than double their 14% share in 2019, according to a new repor...

data.title: Beat Volatility: The Power of Active ETFs
data.text: Active equity ETFs posted double-digit returns in April. Conflicting signals from the Federal Reserve and a fracture in global oil alliances created an environment where stock selection matters.
